import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import ta
def generate_signals(df, params):
    df['adx'] = ta.trend.ADXIndicator(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=params['adx_window']).adx()
    df['ema'] = df['close'].ewm(span=params['ema_span'], adjust=False).mean()
    signals = pd.Series(np.where((df['close'] > df['ema']) & (df['adx'] < params['adx_threshold']), -1, np.where((df['close'] < df['ema']) & (df['adx'] < params['adx_threshold']), 1, 0)), index=df.index)
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: USD/CHF exhibits mean reversion tendencies when trend strength is weak (ADX below threshold), indicating potential reversal opportunities.
